'''hapuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalattology|thalattology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalattology|thalattology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hapuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpichith|hæpichith]] || [[word:hæpichij|hæpichij]] || [[word:hæpichish|hæpichish]] || [[word:hæpichi|hæpichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapupuchuth|hapupuchuth]] || [[word:hapupuchuj|hapupuchuj]] || [[word:hapupuchush|hapupuchush]] || [[word:hapupuchu|hapupuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapuchuth|hapuchuth]] || [[word:hapuchuj|hapuchuj]] || [[word:hapuchush|hapuchush]] || [[word:hapuchu|hapuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapufchuth|hapufchuth]] || [[word:hapufchuj|hapufchuj]] || [[word:hapufchush|hapufchush]] || [[word:hapufchuf|hapufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapuchuthu|hapuchuthu]] || [[word:hapuchuju|hapuchuju]] || [[word:hapuchushu|hapuchushu]] || [[word:hapuchuku|hapuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapuchuth|hapuchuth]] || [[word:hapuchuj|hapuchuj]] || [[word:hapuchush|hapuchush]] || [[word:hapuchu|hapuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapuchuthul|hapuchuthul]] || [[word:hapuchujul|hapuchujul]] || [[word:hapuchushul|hapuchushul]] || [[word:hapuchukul|hapuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hapuchuthuthu|hapuchuthuthu]] || [[word:hapuchujuju|hapuchujuju]] || [[word:hapuchushushu|hapuchushushu]] || [[word:hapuchuku|hapuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapuchuthun|hapuchuthun]] || [[word:hapuchujun|hapuchujun]] || [[word:hapuchushun|hapuchushun]] || [[word:hapuchukun|hapuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapuchuthuoro|hapuchuthuoro]] || [[word:hapuchujuoro|hapuchujuoro]] || [[word:hapuchushuoro|hapuchushuoro]] || [[word:hapuchukuoro|hapuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
